description: Bring coverage back to 100%. Split src/worktree.rs and src/commands/lifecycle.rs so both have headroom under the 300-line cap. Update precommit hook to run check-coverage.sh and fail under 100%. Also file a separate bl task for SPEC §6 delivery-tag resolution (isolated feature, not implemented here).
title: 100% coverage + module split (worktree, lifecycle) + hook enforces coverage
